characters.name: Adam Pratt
characters.description: Adam PrattGeneral InformationFull nameAdam PrattBirthplaceNew York[1]ResidenceLondon,United KingdomBirthdayApril 7th,1993[1]Deathday2022EthnicityCaucasian-AmericanCitizenshipAmerican[1]GenderMaleHair colorBlondEye colorBlueHeight1,78 mOccupationEntrepreneurGamblerSeason4FamilyAlexander Pratt IV(father)[1]Celeste Pratt(mother)[1]Jace Pratt(brother)[1]Alexander Pratt III(grandfather)[1]Alexander Pratt II(great-grandfather)[1]Alexander Pratt(great-great-grandfather)[1]RomancesLady Phoebe(widow)RelationshipsFriendsKate Galvin(formerly)EnemiesJoe GoldbergKate GalvinSeries InformationStatusDeceasedCause of deathTortured to death by men sent byTom LockwoodPortrayed byLukas GageFirst appearanceJoe Takes a HolidayLast appearanceShe's Not ThereAdam Prattis a main character in thefourth seasonof the television seriesYOU. He is portrayed byLukas Gage. He is a pretentious entrepreneur and the boyfriend, later husband, ofLady Phoebe. Pratt Family Adam Pratt is an American expat currently residing in London, and the youngest son of a wealthy East Coast magnate. He is famous for spectacularly failing to meet the standards of his successful, venerable family. An entrepreneur and a gambler, Adam is an amiable and funny party host, and fast friend. But underneath, he hides a trove of secrets, including papering over problems with heavy self-medication. Adam Pratt is an American expat currently residing in London, and the youngest son of a wealthy East Coast magnate. He is famous for spectacularly failing to meet the standards of his successful, venerable family. An entrepreneur and a gambler, Adam is an amiable and funny party host, and fast friend. But underneath, he hides a trove of secrets, including papering over problems with heavy self-medication. Determined to prove himself amid failing business ventures and getting cut off from his wealthy father, Adam takes big, risky swings, living by the truism that a good businessman does absolutely anything he can get away with. Does he love his affluent, titled girlfriend, or her money? There is no doubt he’s manipulating his friends; the only question is how far he’d go... AfterLady Phoebegrows significantly after her interaction with her stalkerDawn. Adam exploit the instable mental state ofLady Phoebeand rushes her into marriage, so he can inherit her millions and take them for himself after he is left bankrupt.

characters.name: Alan Brigham
characters.description: Alan BrighamGeneral InformationFull nameAlan BrighamEthnicityCaucasian-AmericanCitizenshipAmericanGenderMaleOccupationDartmouth College StudentSeason3FamilyGil Brigham(father)Margaret Brigham(mother)Unnamed(sister)Zoe Brigham(sister)RelationshipsEnemiesVickySeries InformationStatusAlivePortrayed byCameron Hennigns Alan Brighamis a minor character in thethird seasonofYOU. He is the son ofGilandMargaret Brigham. Alan Brigham is Gil Brigham’s son. He was in a scandal in Ohio where he sexually assaulted a girl named Vicky. He also raped at-least one other girl. His mother cleaned it up and donates $25,000 to keep her mouth shut. She cheated so he and Vicky could get into Dartmouth and made him have perfect SAT scores.

characters.name: Calvin
characters.description: CalvinGeneral InformationFull nameCalvinResidenceLos Angeles,CaliforniaEthnicityAfrican-AmericanCitizenshipAmericanGenderMaleHair colorBlackEye colorBrownOccupationEmployee atAnavrinSeason2RelationshipsFriendsJoe Goldberg(friend)EnemiesForty QuinnSeries InformationStatusAlivePortrayed byAdwin BrownFirst appearanceA Fresh StartLast appearanceLove, ActuallyCalvinis a recurring character onYOU. He is portrayed byAdwin Brown. A manager at Anavrin, he is dissatisfied with the brand's focus on superficiality than actually caring about literature. He is resentful ofForty, due to being frequently subjected to poor treatment from their clashing interests about the cafe's identity. Calvin interviewsJoe Goldberg(posing asWill Bettelheim) for a clerk position at Anavrin. Initially disinterested due to Joe's lack of experience, he has his interest piqued when Joe pulls out a copy ofCrime & Punishment, and is impressed by Joe's knowledge of it. He gives Joe a tour of Anavrin they share a disappointment of customer's apathy toward literature. He hires Joe on the spot.

characters.name: Claudia
characters.description: ClaudiaGeneral InformationFull nameClaudiaBirthplaceNew YorkResidenceCaliforniaEthnicityHispanicCitizenshipAmericanGenderFemaleHair colorBlackEye colorBrownOccupationNurseSeason1FamilyPaco(son)RomancesRon Baker(ex-boyfriend)RelationshipsFriendsJoe Goldberg(friend)Karen Minty(friend)EnemiesRon Baker(ex-boyfriend and ex-abuser)Series InformationStatusAlivePortrayed byVictoria CartagenaFirst appearancePilotLatest appearanceBluebeard's Castle Claudiais a recurring character inYOU. She is portrayed byVictoria Cartagena. Claudia is the addict mother ofPacoand girlfriend ofRon Baker. Ron frequently physically abuses Claudia in front of Paco, intimidating the boy. Ron as a parole officer threatens to report Claudia's drug addiction to CPS and have Paco removed from her custody if she ever leaves him, thus scaring Claudia into staying with him.
